## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Spec clarification (no behavior change)
- [ ] Spec correction (fixes an error or inconsistency)
- [ ] Spec extension (adds new behavior)
- [ ] Test vectors
- [ ] Documentation / README
- [ ] Other

## Section(s) affected

List the spec section numbers this PR modifies.

## Problem this solves

Reference the issue this PR addresses (e.g. `Closes #42`).

## Tradeoffs and alternatives considered

For any spec change: what did you consider and why did you choose this approach?

## Breaking change?

- [ ] Yes — this change makes existing conformant implementations non-conformant
- [ ] No

If yes, explain the migration path and why the break is justified.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have opened an issue and discussed this change before submitting (for spec changes)
- [ ] My changes are consistent with the rest of the spec
- [ ] I have updated relevant sections of README.md if needed
